meta.notes: v1.0.6 installed from CMS via direct API call. rootPrefix='' but zip contained music-beat-sync/ subfolder — manual flatten needed. hype vibe @ 120 BPM. Music generation (MiniMax) took 128.2s for 16.5s track. Short track issue observed (previous finding confirmed).

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Charli D'Amelio daily vlog, TikTok-style vertical short-form video

task.name: music-beat-sync
task.purpose: Add BPM-matched hype music to a 67.8s vertical video with beat-aligned scene cuts (sync mode)
task.expected_output: MP4 with background hype music; scene cuts aligned to 120 BPM beats; original audio replaced

install.notes: CMS fetch: 218ms. Zip 31KB downloaded in 121ms, extracted in 4ms. rootPrefix='' but zip had music-beat-sync/ subfolder — required manual flatten (mv). v1.0.6: 691 lines. Subagent boot: 14.3s.

steps.name: scene_detection
steps.notes: ffmpeg scene detection threshold 0.35 — detected 26 scene changes in 67.8s video

steps.name: music_generation_minimax
steps.notes: MiniMax API — hype @ 120 BPM trap hip-hop. Returned 16.5s track after 128.2s wait. Short track issue: 67.8s video / 16.5s track = 4.1x loop required. Consistent with prior benchmark findings.

steps.name: beat_alignment
steps.notes: 136 beats @ 120 BPM (0.5s interval). 26 cuts aligned to beats. Speed adjustments 0.867x-1.133x. Mode: sync (auto-selected). Internal to script.

steps.name: audio_mix
steps.notes: Mode=replace — original audio replaced with music. Internal to script.

steps.name: beat_sync_full
steps.notes: Full beat_sync.py wall time including all sub-steps. S1-S5 completed. Output 16.0 MB.

execution.notes: beat_sync.py ran in 191.7s. Music generation dominates: 128.2s = 66.8% of script time. Beat alignment + ffmpeg mix: ~63.5s remaining. Scene detection (standalone): 3.7s.

delivery.notes: Output 16388KB (vs 4790KB input, 3.4x). Upload ~1.1 MB/s. Size increase from re-encode + audio replacement.
